popup:
Sulina Road

While it is a female name, it was unlikely that the road, originally called Lynton Cottages (Gower, 2004, pp.13), was named for it's name, and moreso for the town Sulina in Romania.

Campbell Close

This can also be found on the female map as it is a unisex name.

Ellison Road

This can also be found on the female map as it is a unisex name.

Ellora Road

This is a female name, but the road is most likely named after the Ellora caves in India.

Prentis Road

This road is specifically named after Elizabeth Prentis, who died in 1892. Beriah Drew, Lord of the Manor of Leigham, named it after his wife's maiden name (Brown, 2003, pp. 15)

Angles Road

This road is specifically named after Jane Angles Fisher, the daughter of Beriah Drew, a local landowner (Gower, 2012, pp. 16)
